title: clitoria stipularis
intro: Clitoria stipularis, also known as Butterfly Pea, is a plant species native to tropical Asia and Australia, characterized by its blue, trumpet-shaped flowers and edible seeds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Clitoria stipularis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and supporting eye health due to its high content of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds. Clitoria stipularis can be prepared as a herbal tea, extract, or supplement, and its seeds can be used as a natural food colorant, making it a versatile and valuable plant in various cultural and medicinal contexts.
